trimNote: Sanitized the recording scratch-directory absolute path down to station-work/ — noise removal, not content. Tool results were shortened to their essential facts (a full ls listing and a full file read became one-line summaries) since the reader can see the real conclusions in the next turn. Nothing was added or reworded.

turns.text: There is one document in this folder. Read it and give me a short summary I could read out loud at tomorrow's meeting — just the key points, in plain English.

tool.name: Read
tool.result: A Monday staff-meeting memo: pledge-drive recap, programming notes, underwriting, engineering, and a list of action items — about 24 lines.

turns.text:
Here's a short summary you could read out loud:

**Lakeside Public Radio — Monday staff meeting recap (March 9)**

The spring pledge drive closed Friday at $184,300, beating our $175,000 goal. Sustainers were the big win: 61 new monthly donors, up from 44 last fall, with about a third of those coming from the $10-a-month Coffee Club tier. Saturday morning asks underperformed compared to weekday drive time, so Priya wants to cut Saturday ask time in half for the fall drive and shift that time to weekday mornings.

On programming, the local adds meeting is Tuesday. Two touring acts on the list are playing the Back Room the same week their singles go into rotation, and Carl wants that cross-promoted on air, not just in the newsletter. He also asked engineering to trace a listener's dead-air report from early Sunday overnight.

Underwriting signed three new Q2 sponsors: a credit union, a bookstore, and a brewery. The credit union's draft copy needs cleanup before it can run — it came in with pricing claims and a call to action, which station policy and FCC guidance don't allow. Legal review is Thursday.

Engineering: the transmitter inspection is next Wednesday, the backup generator test passed, and the Studio B mixing board part is still about two weeks out. Last month's streaming outage was an expired certificate, now on a 60-day renewal reminder.

**Action items:** Priya drafts the fall Saturday schedule change by next Monday. Carl gets cross-promo language to Dana. Jo sends the cleaned-up credit union copy to legal by Wednesday. Theo confirms the mixing board ETA with the vendor. Dana follows up with the board treasurer on the Q2 budget variance.
